_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Animated Glow Card
_meta.description: A React component that renders a visually striking card with an animated, glowing border effect. This component uses an SVG filter (feColorMatrix) to achieve the customizable glow, enhancing UI elements with a modern and interactive feel. It includes a CardCanvas to house the SVG filter definition and a Card component for the main content display, complete with border elements. Ideal for drawing attention to featured content, calls to action, or simply adding a touch of dynamic visual flair to your application.
